rule: Alias Resolution V1 is audit-only. It creates source-backed alias candidates and manual review queues only; it does not mutate canon or resolve aliases automatically.

blocked_rules.missing_set_code: Blocked until source provenance is recovered. Do not infer set identity from name/number alone.
blocked_rules.out_of_scope_pocket: Blocked from English physical TCG master index unless scope changes.
blocked_rules.subset_number_collision: Blocked until subset numbering and source set alias are proven together.
blocked_rules.name_mismatch: Blocked from identity rewrite; review as card-name display/alias evidence only.
